manufacturer_from_details: ‎ linhai city hengguang lighting CO., LTD
features: A Festive Glow for Any Season: Nextronix Battery Powered Fairy Lights is a 20-meter-long string of enchanting LED lights, perfect for festive decorations. With an additional 3-meter extension cord, you have the flexibility to spread the magic wherever you need it. Powered by just 3 AA batteries（not included）, Battery lights are easy to set up and perfect for any holiday or celebration

8 Lighting Modes: Customizable for every setting, comes with 8 different lighting modes, easily switchable by pressing a button on the control box. Whether you're looking for a steady glow or a twinkling effect, you can find the perfect mode for your event or mood. battery fairy lights indoor are versatile and suitable for a wide range of settings from indoor gatherings to outdoor parties

Energy-Saving Timer: Built-in timer, no need to open manually(no button), automatically opens and closes, smart and Efficient Illumination. Battery outdoor lights will shine for 6 hours and then automatically turn off for 18 hours. This feature not only saves electricity but also ensures the lights last longer, making them an eco-friendly and cost-effective choice for long-term use

Weather-Resistant and Safe to Touch: Boasting an IP44 water resistance rating, our fairy lights are crafted to withstand various weather conditions, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use. The materials used are safe to touch, not get hot even after extended use, so children and pets can enjoy the lights without any risk

DIY Flexibility: Portable and shapeable for creative displays, The battery fairy lights are portable and easy to shape, allowing you to create unique lighting designs for any space. Nice accessories for dorm, window, living room, patio, hallway, porch, balcony, pergola, corridor, bannister, pavilion, fence, tent, and shelf. Adding a touch of magic to your garden, these lights offer endless creative possibilities
Worry-Free: If our products are subjected to abnormal conditions or broken, Please don't hesitate to contact us, and we will solve all your issues and make you satisfied.
